item.title: IMF releasing $2.3 billion to Egypt after reforms help to stabilize the economy
item.description: The IMF is letting Egypt tap about $2.3 billion more from its loan program after it says reforms are steadying the economy

item.title: Wall Street futures unchanged before the bell after Nvidia earnings beat expectations
item.description: U.S. futures were in a holding pattern after stronger-than-expected earnings from chipmaker Nvidia helped ease some investor worries over the artifici...

item.title: Fire at an Ohio farm complex kills about 6,000 hogs and smoke is visible for miles
item.description: A fire chief says a fire at an Ohio hog farm complex has killed about 6,000 of the animals

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo buys stake in Saudi-owned second-tier Spanish club
item.description: A consulting firm representing Cristiano Ronaldo says the Portuguese soccer star has purchased a stake in Spanish second-division club Almeria

item.title: Feds give record $27B in loans for utility expansion in Georgia and Alabama
item.description: Federal energy officials say they will loan a record $27 billion federal loan to Georgia Power and Alabama Power to expand electricity supply
